description.en: An ontology for modelling medical devices, safety incidents, risk classifications, manufacturers, regulatory frameworks and corrective actions in the medical device domain.

comments.en: Ontology for representing medical devices, incidents, risks, manufacturers, regulatory frameworks and corrective actions.

provenance.value: The ontology was developed as part of an academic practice on ontology engineering, documentation and publication using Protégé, WIDOCO, OOPS!, FOOPS! and GitHub Pages.
